description_long: This is a large, ornate vanity or dresser cabinet featuring a wide tabletop surface and a prominent, integrated mirror framed with decorative molding. The front face displays a symmetrical arrangement of drawers, with three drawers on each side and a central drawer above a knee space, all adorned with square handles. The cabinet is primarily finished in a light color, accented with subtle gold or beige trim along the edges and drawer fronts, giving it a refined, classical appearance. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the depth and solid construction of the piece. The mirror is rectangular and occupies the upper half of the structure, making it suitable for grooming or decorative purposes. This object is likely constructed from wood with a painted or lacquered finish, and may include metal hardware for the handles.
description: A large, elegant vanity or dresser cabinet with a wide tabletop, integrated framed mirror, and multiple drawers with decorative trim and handles.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the mirror and the solid, unadorned rear panels of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the thickness of the tabletop, and the profile of the mirror frame.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of drawers, central knee space, ornate trim, and the large framed mirror.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the side profile of the mirror.
